## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Promptfoo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and article production.](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Improper output handling article ready for final review; new articles to focus on OWASP Top 10 AI/ML vulnerabilities](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Team to produce 2-3 articles per week, prioritizing system prompt leakage, unbounded consumption, and excessive agency](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Content strategy evolving towards building comprehensive pillar content with individual topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

## Topics

### Article Review and Publication

  - [Improper output handling article ready for final review by Ian, Michael, and RCTR](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Second article (unspecified) being regenerated due to mixed-up source material, available for review tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Team tweaking processes for smoother article production moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

### Content Pipeline and Prioritization

  - [Initial list of topics included cellular type prevention, API security, and various attack types](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Shifted focus to OWASP Top 10 AI/ML vulnerabilities for more relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Ian to provide feedback on existing topics, using comments for context and prioritization tags](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### OWASP Top 10 AI/ML Focus

  - [Team to create articles for each OWASP Top 10 vulnerability](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Prioritized topics: system prompt leakage, unbounded consumption, excessive agency](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Additional topics: sensitive information disclosure, data and model poisoning (to be rewritten), vector and embedding weaknesses](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Moving towards a pillar cluster approach:](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
    1.  Create individual articles on specific topics
    2.  Ensure quality and depth of individual pieces
    3.  Eventually combine into comprehensive, high-level content
    4.  Allow readers to dive deeper into specific clusters

### Resource Utilization

  - [Team encouraged to leverage Promptfoo's existing documentation](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Documentation aligns plugins with OWASP Top 10, providing valuable source material](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ian to update Airtable with prioritized topics and provide feedback on existing list](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Team to focus on producing 2-3 articles for next week, starting with system prompt leakage, unbounded consumption, and excessive agency](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Vivek to update team when OWASP Top 10 list is updated for the application layer blog post](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Team to continue refining content strategy and production process for more efficient reviews and approvals](https://fathom.video/share/RynJFTGVPi_M-u25vbVU8xe6u2kVhwH4?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
